methods.name: odoo.addons.product_main_supplierinfo.models.product_product.ProductProduct._get_sellers
documentation:
Returns all available sellers of a product based on some constraints.

They are ordered and filtered like it is done in the standard 'product' addon.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_main_supplierinfo.tests.test_product_main_supplier.TestProductMainSupplierInfo.test_main_seller_1
documentation: "Case 1: all the sellers share the same company.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_main_supplierinfo.tests.test_product_main_supplier.TestProductMainSupplierInfo.test_main_seller_2
documentation: "Case 2: the sellers do not share the same company.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_main_supplierinfo.tests.test_product_main_supplier.TestProductMainSupplierInfo.test_main_seller_3
documentation: "Case 3: the sellers have different start/end dates.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_main_supplierinfo.tests.test_product_main_supplier.TestProductMainSupplierInfo.test_main_seller_4
documentation: Case 4: No valid supplier so select one related to the variant.
